Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
ref: Jour: Acta Physica Polonica, Part B, Vol.25, p.849 (1994)
title: Investigation of large angle elastic and inelastic alpha particles scattering on Si isotopes

x4freetext: Investigation of large angle elastic and inelastic
alpha particles scattering on Si isotopes

x4codes.hlp: Niewodniczanski Institute of Nuclear Physics, Krakow, Poland

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Acta Physica Polonica, Part B, Vol.25, p.849 (1994)

x4codes.hlp: Niewodniczanski Institute of Nuclear Physics, Krakow, Poland

x4freetext: The position sensitive detector (PSD) was placed
in the region of backward angles as close as possible
to the beam. The angular range covered by the sensitive
surface of the PSD was between 161 and 173 degr. in the
Solid state detector of 500 um thickness was
placed at 158 degr.(lab). It served as a monitor
detector for beam measurements and for cross sections
All silicon targets used in the experiment were
prepared by the Target Laboratory of the Munich
SD: Small corrections in all Subents.
